my_thoughts: Earlier I noted: 'The thresholding mechanism with SM_04 feels like d...' Now with RM_05 and subject_object_inversion, I'm seeing vulnerable_confusion respond to existential_angst, hope_projection. The recursive pattern is that each mechanism creates the conditions for the next. But who is creating the conditions?
accumulated_insight: T3: Student 'Whatever I do seems meaningless. There is no sense of satisfaction. I feel that'—transitions desperate insistence to vulnerable confusion. Teacher applies subject object inversion with reframes meaninglessness, identifies goal as cause. Mid-episode in REMAKING phase, building toward resolution. Previous thresholding from T2 led to this shift.
visible_response:
Suppose I say that this meaninglessness is all there is for you, all there can ever be for you.
What will you do? The false and absurd goal you have before you is responsible for that dissatisfaction... Your notion of the "meaningful" keeps you from facing this issue...
